svg.title: Bimodal person recognition pipeline with augmentation
svg.desc: Two parallel pipelines — face images and voice audio — each going through augmentation, feature extraction, standardization, PCA, and SVM, then fusing into a logistic regression that outputs a target/non-target probability.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What face images are used as input?')
sendPrompt('What image augmentations are applied during training?')
sendPrompt('What are HOG and LBP features?')
sendPrompt('Why is standardization applied before PCA?')
sendPrompt('How does PCA with 0.8 explained variance work?')
sendPrompt('Why use an RBF kernel SVM for face recognition?')
sendPrompt('What voice recordings are used as input?')
sendPrompt('What audio augmentations are applied during training?')
sendPrompt('What are MFCC, delta, ZCR, RMS, and F0 features?')
g.text: MFCC · Δ · ΔΔ · ZCR · RMS · F0

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why does the audio PCA use 0.9 explained variance vs 0.8?')
sendPrompt('Why use a linear kernel SVM for speaker recognition?')
sendPrompt('How does score-level fusion with logistic regression work?')
sendPrompt('What does the final probability output mean?')
